properties.description: Extended master pipeline. Steps: 1) Lookup metadata config, 2) ForEach entity in parallel -> Bronze ingestion (child pipeline), 3) After ALL entities finish -> Silver transformation Databricks notebook. Bronze and Silver run in sequence — Silver only starts if all Bronze succeeds.

p_load_type.description: full or incremental — passed to Bronze child pipelines AND Silver notebook

activities.name: act_read_metadata
activities.description: Lookup — reads pipeline_metadata_config.json from Bronze ADLS. Returns all entity configs.

activities.name: act_foreach_entity
activities.description: Iterate over all enabled entities in parallel. Each calls pl_bronze_api_ingest_v4 for Bronze ingestion. Silver transformation only starts AFTER this ForEach completes successfully.

activities.name: act_ingest_entity
activities.description: Bronze ingestion for one entity — calls child pipeline pl_bronze_api_ingest_v4.

activities.name: act_silver_transform
activities.description: Silver transformation — runs Databricks notebook 04_silver_all_entities_job_params_v4 AFTER all Bronze entities have been ingested. Reads Bronze JSON from Volume, applies data quality pipeline, writes Silver Delta tables. Passes load_type and today's ingestion_date as job parameters. Only runs if ForEach succeeded.
